MASTER_OF_MANKIND-KHORNE_BOON_POWER.smar: At turn start, gain 8 Vigor per level. Current level: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WRATH_MARK_POWER.title: Wrath
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WRATH_MARK_POWER.descr: At turn end, lose 4 HP for each Attack below this amount played or executed this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WRATH_MARK_POWER.smart: At turn end, lose 4 HP for each Attack below [red]{Amount}[/red] played or executed this turn.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-DECEPTION_MARK_POWER.d: For each card chosen for Tzeentch's transformation, another random card is forcibly transformed, up to this amount.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-DECEPTION_MARK_POWER.s: For each chosen transformation, forcibly transform up to [red]{Amount}[/red] other random cards.
At turn end, lose HP equal to this amount.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-OBSESSION_MARK_POWER.d: At turn end, random non-Curse and non-Status cards are Retained and cost 1 more until played.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-OBSESSION_MARK_POWER.s: At turn end, force up to [red]{Amount}[/red] random cards to be Retained and cost 1 more until played.
Gain defense or draw based on actions predicted for 2 turns from now.
If any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block. Otherwise, if any enemy has an action predicted for 2 turns from now, draw 1 card.
Draw whenever a Decree is executed.
Whenever a Decree is executed, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_LOGISTICS_POW: Discount the next card that costs 2 or more.
The next card that costs 2 or more costs [blue]{Amount}[/blue] less.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-THE_ASTRONOMICAN_POWER: Draw based on cards Retained last turn.
At turn start, draw 1 card per card Retained last turn, up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-IMPERIAL_MANDATE_POWER: Execute every Decree immediately when prepared.
Every Decree you prepare is executed immediately.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-PRESCIENCE_INCARNATE_P: Gain defense or resources based on actions predicted for 2 turns from now.
If any enemy has an Attack predicted for 2 turns from now, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block. Otherwise, if any enemy has an action predicted for 2 turns from now, gain 1 Energy and draw 1 card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-SANCTUM_IMPERIALIS_POW: While Foresight is active, Block is not removed at turn start.
While Foresight is active, Block is not removed at turn start.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-APOTHEOSIS_OF_MAN_POWE: Gain Strength and Dexterity each turn.
At turn start, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Strength and Dexterity.
Draw the first time you gain Artifact each turn.
The first time you gain Artifact each turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-WAR_IN_THE_WEBWAY_POWE: Gain resources whenever a Decree is executed.
Whenever a Decree is executed, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Energy and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-MACHINE_GODS_REVELATIO: Gain Energy on the first card costing 2 or more each turn.
The first time you play a card costing 2 or more each turn, gain 1 Energy.
Permanently enchant a card in your deck with Retain at the end of combat.
At the end of combat, choose 1 card in your deck and permanently enchant it with [gold]Retain[/gold].
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-ETERNITY_GATE_COUNTERS: Next turn, after resolving prepared Decrees, immediately repeat the last Decree executed.
MASTER_OF_MANKIND-APOTHEOSIS_OF_WAR_POWE: Upgrade cards Retained at end of turn for this combat.
